steps.action: Scroll to the footer, capture an annotated screenshot, and inspect all footer anchors via DOM evaluation
steps.expected: The footer exposes GitHub and npm links with valid external URLs plus `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`
steps.observed: The footer rendered two visible 44px-tall links labeled `GitHub repo` and `npm package`; their hrefs were `https://github.com/moizibnyousaf/mktg` and `https://www.npmjs.com/package/mktg`, and both anchors had `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.

evidence.network: After reload the browser tracked only local Next.js document/assets requests with no failures: GET /, two font files, app/layout.css, webpack.js, main-app.js, app-pages-internals.js, and app/page.js.

steps.action: Inspect footer text nodes and verify visibility in the bottom-of-page screenshot
steps.expected: The footer shows the 2026 copyright line and the exact tagline `Built for agents, by agents`, both visible and unclipped
steps.observed:
Two visible `

` elements rendered inside the footer: `© 2026 mktg` at 172.83x20px and `Built for agents, by agents` at 172.83x20px; both were fully visible in the footer screenshot.

evidence.network: No additional network activity was required beyond the local document/assets requests captured after reload.

measurements.footerText: © 2026 mktg Built for agents, by agents GitHub repo npm package

steps.action: Measure the top-level rendered body elements and compare the footer bottom edge to the document scroll height
steps.expected: The page uses a `<footer>` element as the last rendered content block, and no visible page content appears below it
steps.observed: `document.querySelector('footer')` returned a `<footer>` element spanning 5870.5px to 5983.5px on the page; the document scroll height was 5984px, so the footer bottom aligned within 0.5px rounding tolerance and no visible top-level content rendered after the footer.

evidence.network: No additional requests were needed beyond the local page reload and asset fetches.

steps.action: Measure the footer at desktop width 1024px and inspect its internal structure
steps.expected: The footer remains compact (<= 200px tall) with a minimal layout and no large imagery or complex visual blocks
steps.observed: At 1024px wide the footer measured 1024x113px, contained two short text lines plus a two-link nav, and had zero `` elements; the visible descendant count was limited to seven nodes, consistent with a minimal footer design.

evidence.network: No network activity beyond the local page/document asset requests was relevant to this visual inspection.

measurements.footerLayoutSummary: One text block on the left and one two-link nav on the right.

summary: Tested 4 footer assertions against the live localhost:3200 page in browser session 0f916ecfbd72__u6; all 4 passed.
